name: The Mournmore Killings
short_description: The Mournmore Killings a story-driven, deduction based mystery game where you step into the shoes of a detective trying to solve the enigmatic riddles left behind by a serial killer.
detailed_description:
The Mournmore Killings a story-driven, deduction based mystery game where you step into the shoes of a detective trying to solve the enigmatic riddles left behind by a serial killer. Set in the eerie town of Mournmore, you must navigate through a series of crime scenes, read the notes, identify the victims and find out what they were killed for.

Key Features:

- Make Deductions: There is no inventory system. No hand-holding. You have to make use of your deductions skills and inspect whatever evidence you can find to solve the riddles left by the killer.

- A rich story: As you progress through different cases, you will find out the reason behind the killings.

- Atmospheric Setting and Music: Dark ambience music to accompany you on the crime scenes.

- Retro Graphics: Pixelated, PS1-like graphics to match the eerie tone of the setting.
